title: WORK_PACKET V1 (DEPRECATED)
description: V1 governance envelope for planned work. DEPRECATED — retained for backwards-compatible reading only. All new work packets must use V2 schema at sys/contracts/work_packet.schema.json. Translation shim available at sys/runtime/v1_translation_shim.json.

requires_pressure_test.description: If true, Builder must produce ARCH_PRESSURE_REPORT.json and FLOW_PRESSURE_REPORT.json. Must be true when architectural_flag is true.

flow_contract.description: Required when structural objects or event flows change. Declares the IMO contract for the change.

ingress.description: Ingress surface identifiers affected by this change.

middle.description: Middle layer transformation identifiers affected by this change.

egress.description: Egress surface identifiers affected by this change.
